params.name: Tesla Turbine
params.description:
On Apr 19, 1913 AD, Tesla obtained a patent for his invention.
The Tesla turbine is a turbine that is bladeless and is only driven by fluid shear forces. The body consists of a set of smooth disks, and there are nozzles on the disks continuously blowing an airstream toward the edge of the disk. Due to the viscosity of the fluid and the viscosity of the gas at the surface, the airstream is adsorbed onto the disk.
